subject: [PATCH v3 01/16] mm: decouple protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch decouples the protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING by introducing a new configuration option, CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PTE_PROTNONE. This allows architectures that support present-but-inaccessible page table entries (protnone PTEs) to use them independently of NUMA balancing. The patch updates various architecture-specific code and Kconfig files to reflect this change, enabling six architectures to select the protnone infrastructure without relying on CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING.
